themes.theme: US-Iran peace talks stalling drives oil toward $100, reshaping energy-linked FX
USD broadly depressed on peace hopes and Fed leadership uncertainty, DXY bearish below 98.50
Central bank super-week: BoJ hike signal, Fed caution, ECB/BoE decisions all in focus
JPY crosses bid as markets price BoJ June hike signal while risk appetite holds

key_observation: The Strait of Hormuz reopening proposal is simultaneously depressing USD on de-escalation hopes while pushing oil toward $100 on stalled talks, creating a contradictory impulse where energy-linked currencies benefit from both narratives.
watch: BoJ policy decision this week — a June hike signal could trigger sharp JPY strength and unwind the crowded JPY-funded carry trades visible in AUD/JPY and GBP/JPY.
